description: Determines what happens during time gaps in your adventure, such as travel between locations or periods of downtime. Part of the Fantasy World Crafter system.

descriptionTranslations.en: Determines what happens during time gaps in your adventure, such as travel between locations or periods of downtime. Part of the Fantasy World Crafter system.

entries.description: The gap unfolds as expected with no surprises.

descriptionTranslations.en: The gap unfolds as expected with no surprises.

entries.description: The gap goes smoother than expected, with some benefit to the PC.

descriptionTranslations.en: The gap goes smoother than expected, with some benefit to the PC.

entries.description: Something goes terribly wrong during the gap, creating a significant problem.

descriptionTranslations.en: Something goes terribly wrong during the gap, creating a significant problem.

entries.description: The gap unfolds as expected, but with an unexpected twist. Roll on Action Meaning tables for context.

descriptionTranslations.en: The gap unfolds as expected, but with an unexpected twist. Roll on Action Meaning tables for context.
